description: All available tools in VibePilot. Tools are primitives that skills use. Agents are scoped to specific tools.

tools.name: Web Browser
tools.description: Navigate websites, fill forms, click, extract content. Used by courier skill.

tools.name: File Read
tools.description: Read files from filesystem. Used by internal runners for codebase access.

tools.name: File Write
tools.description: Write files to filesystem. Used by internal runners to create/modify code.

tools.name: Supabase Query
tools.description: Query Supabase database for state, metrics, task history. Used by Vibes agent.

tools.name: Supabase Write
tools.description: Write to Supabase database. Used by orchestrator for state updates.

tools.name: Web Search
tools.description: Search the web for information. Used by research skill.

tools.name: Git Operations
tools.description: Branch, commit, push, merge. Used by internal runners for code changes.

tools.name: CLI Execution
tools.description: Execute shell commands. Used by internal CLI runner.

tools.name: Speech to Text
tools.description: Convert speech to text. Used by Vibes for voice input.

tools.name: Text to Speech
tools.description: Convert text to speech. Used by Vibes for voice output.
